0:
Amh Garanjy brightens when she sees you, glancing at a sack brimming with Starlight goodies.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

Amh Garanjy brightens when she sees you, glancing at a sack brimming with Starlight goodies.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
Reluctant to abandon your duties as the Saint of Nymeia, you agree to distribute presents to younglings passing by Mih Khetto's Amphitheatre. Sack of gifts in hand, you pass through the swinging gates and assume your most saintly expression.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.
